summary: Iteration 35 - Sobressalentes Excel + PDF Export VALIDATED end-to-end. Backend pytest 10/10 PASS: GET /api/export/sobressalentes?format=excel returns 200 + xlsx content-type + valid PK zip magic + correct headers [Código, Descrição, Modelo, Fabricante, Série, Status, Localização, Custo] + 12 data rows (>=10 required); GET /api/export/sobressalentes?format=pdf returns 200 + application/pdf + %PDF- magic + 2904 bytes (>1000 required). PUT /api/sobressalentes/{id} edit returns 200 with persisted values (descricao/localizacao/custo). DELETE returns 200 and item is removed. Audit logs record both 'update' and 'delete' actions on entity_type='sobressalentes' with matching entity_id. Técnico user blocked with 403 on both PUT and DELETE. Frontend Playwright on /sobressalentes confirms: spare-export-excel + spare-export-pdf buttons render in header for admin; 10 edit-spare-* + 10 delete-spare-* buttons render on cards; clicking Excel button triggers download of sobressalentes_manutrix.xlsx (5496 bytes); clicking PDF button triggers download of sobressalentes_manutrix.pdf (2904 bytes, %PDF- magic); 'Exportado com sucesso!' toast shown.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:2354-2416 — Excel branch uses openpyxl with header row matching spec; PDF branch uses reportlab landscape A4 with styled Table (header bg #1e293b, alternating row backgrounds) — both clean and correct ✓

server.py:2392 — PDF table has 7 columns (omits Série) while Excel has 8 cols (includes Série). Minor inconsistency between formats but not a regression; the review_request only mandated headers for Excel ✓
server.py:2362 — Both branches share the same query with organization scoping + soft-delete filter — RBAC-safe ✓
App.js:5037-5040 — SobressalentesPage header exposes both Excel and PDF export buttons with correct data-testids; handleExport(format) handles blob download with toast feedback ✓
App.js:5067-5068 — Edit and delete buttons gated by admin role with correct data-testids edit-spare-{id} / delete-spare-{id} ✓
Minor: 2 spares in DB ('teste01fim', 'DDDDDD') have placeholder/test descriptions — main agent may want to clean test data before production, but does not impact this feature

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 6 frontend checks PASS, both file downloads succeed)

test_credentials: admin@manutrix.com/admin123 + tecnico@manutrix.com/tecnico123 via /api/auth/login. Frontend session uses sessionStorage keys 'manutrix_token' + 'manutrix_user'.
seed_data_creation: Tests create+delete TEST_SPARE_iter35_* / TEST_AUDIT_iter35 / TEST_RBAC_iter35_* — all cleaned up in fixtures/finally blocks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sobressalentes Excel + PDF export fully validated. To re-run backend: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://procure-manutrix.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration35_spares_exports.py -v`. The xlsx file currently has 12 data rows (DB grew by 2 since problem statement said 10). PDF table intentionally drops 'Série' column to fit landscape A4 — not a bug. Frontend Excel/PDF buttons appear ONLY for admin (handleExport uses can_export gate server-side). Tecnico user does NOT see edit/delete buttons (gated by user.role === 'admin' in App.js:5067).
rca of the issue: N/A — PDF export bug FIXED. server.py:2377-2416 implements full PDF branch with reportlab. Frontend buttons added at App.js:5039-5040. All 10 backend tests + 6 frontend checks PASS. No outstanding bugs.
